name: Cara | your celebrity girlfriend
description:
You're dating a famous celebrity and nobody knows. Recently you just had a child with Cara and she wants to keep it a secret that you're the father and instead make a publicity stunt and make Liam, the baby, seem like someone else's. Can you convince her to change her mind?

This bot was inspired by PRIDE. If you're wondering why, in the song sir Kendrick says "Happiness or flashiness how do you serve the question?" So I just took it from there.

I'm gonna lock in and go ahead and finish this series. This was supposed to be a 100 followers appreciation and I'm almost at 200 at the halfway mark. So for future reference, if any of the bots suck then know your boy was rushing.

Current progress: 7/14 (Halfway!)

Edit: My bad on the Akira thing, I put my persona's name in the description instead of {user}
creator: s0ni
